llmResponse.agenda_changes: Multiple agenda items were moved/reordered during the meeting. Items 10, 11, 12, and 13.1-13.6 were moved to after item 7.1 (after agenda approval) as consent items. Specifically: Bond Program Consent Items (10, 11, 12) and Action Items 13.1-13.6 (second readings on board policies) were consolidated and voted as consent bundles before proceeding to regular discussion items.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Can I get a motion to approve the consent items 12.1 through 12.7, as well as 13 point action items 13.1 through 13.6?
